channel.title: Django on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Django on Arrans github.io

item.title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
item.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

item.title: suitenumerique/docs
item.description: A collaborative note taking, wiki and documentation platform that scales. Built with Django and React.

item.title: etesync/server
item.description: The Etebase server (so you can run your own)
